channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Herbert and Burns tie major record with 62 at British Open
item.description: Lucas Herbert and Sam Burns made history at the 154th Open Championship by achieving a record-breaking round of eight-under par 62, tying the lowest score in major golf history. The duo's performance ...

item.title: Understanding seal behaviour through Neil the Seal's unique interactions
item.description: Neil the Seal, a five-year-old southern elephant seal, has become a social media sensation due to his antics at Seven Mile Beach in Tasmania. While his behaviour of lounging on streets and climbing on...

item.title: Zimbabwean women rebuild lives after climate disaster but face ongoing challenges
item.description: The article discusses how women in Tsholotsho, Zimbabwe, were displaced by Cyclone Dineo in 2017, losing homes, farmland, and livelihoods. Despite these losses, women actively worked to support their ...

item.title: Leon Black Testifies About Epstein's Role in Nondisclosure Agreements
item.description: Newly released transcripts from a House Oversight Committee interview reveal billionaire Leon Black's panicked attempts to avoid discussing nondisclosure agreements (NDAs) linked to convicted sex offe...

item.title: education updates: ielts transition, neet ecosystem, and university admissions in july 2026
item.description: the article highlights key developments in the education sector as of july 17, 2026. computer-based ielts will replace paper-based exams in india from september, with paper-based exams ending in augus...

item.title: Cabinet Secretary Abalos Extends Condolences at Motorcycle Rider's Wake After Fatal Attack
item.description: Cabinet Secretary Benjamin 'Benhur' Abalos Jr. attended the wake of slain motorcycle rider Fabio Norberte Jr., extending President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.'s condolences to his family. Abalos provided fin...

item.title: Governor Radda Urges Katsina Residents to Expose Bandit Informants and Collaborators for Lasting Peace
item.description: Katsina State Governor, Malam Dikko Umaru Radda, has called on residents to expose bandit informants and collaborators, stressing that lasting peace cannot be achieved if criminal networks continue to...

item.title: Dyson Hot+Cool HF1: A Year-Round Smart Appliance Review
item.description: The Dyson Hot+Cool HF1 is a 2-in-1 smart appliance that provides heating in winter and cooling in summer, offering year-round comfort. Priced at $499, it combines Dyson's bladeless design with smart c...

item.title: Tanzania recognizes OSHA's role in rural development
item.description: The article highlights Tanzania's recognition of OSHA's contributions to national development, particularly in improving rural water access. It notes that rural water coverage has risen to 85%, a sign...

item.title: NMC Defends Philippines' Maritime Rights Amid China's Racist Video Controversy
item.description: The National Maritime Council (NMC) reiterated that a racist video published by China Daily cannot alter the Philippines' legal rights in the West Philippine Sea. The council emphasized that the Phili...

item.title: Former Police Official Arrested in R15m Precious Stones Theft Investigation
item.description: A former Ekurhuleni Metropolitan Police Department (EMPD) official, known as Witness K, has been arrested in connection with an alleged theft of precious stones worth nearly R15 million during a raid ...

item.title: Australian MPs grapple with escalating security threats and political polarization
item.description: Australian politicians are experiencing unprecedented security challenges, with MPs, staff, and families facing heightened risks. The article highlights the alarming rise in threats, including online ...

item.title: Chadema youth leader arrested by police in Shinyanga district
item.description: Confusion spread in Shinyanga after reports emerged that Alfred Massanja, the Council of Chadema Youth (Bavicha) district secretary, was abducted by unknown individuals early Friday. However, party of...

item.title: Josh Kerr Aims to Break 1500m World Record at London Diamond League
item.description: Josh Kerr, the former 1500m world champion and double Olympic medallist, is preparing to challenge Hicham El Gerrouj’s 27-year-old world record of 3:43.13 at the Wanda Diamond League event in London. ...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford Criticizes U.S. Politicians Over Wildfire Smoke Complaints
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has criticized U.S. politicians for their complaints about smoke from wildfires, calling their remarks 'insulting' and 'chirping.' The controversy arose after American lawmak...

item.title: Tragic Accident: 2-Year-Old Dies After Finding Firearm at Home
item.description: A 2-year-old boy tragically shot and killed himself in a firearm accident at his home in Highland, San Bernardino County, according to authorities. The incident occurred on Thursday night when the chi...

item.title: Two High School Students Killed in Basilan Highway Crash
item.description: On July 16, a tragic incident occurred on the Basilan highway where two high school students were fatally injured after their motorcycle collided with another vehicle. The accident happened when the a...

item.title: Trump's Plan to Replace Illegal Truck Drivers with Veterans Could Impact Indian Immigrants
item.description: President Donald Trump has announced plans to replace illegal immigrant truck drivers with American war veterans, a policy that could significantly impact Indian immigrants in the U.S. The decision fo...

item.title: Evacuation Orders Issued for Northwestern Ontario Communities Amid Wildfires
item.description: Wildfires continue to burn across northwestern Ontario, prompting another evacuation order for areas near Lac des Mille Lacs. Residents of Baril, Windigoostigwan lakes, and surrounding regions have be...

item.title: Violence Reported in Kenya's Ol Kalou By-Election Amid 2027 Election Concerns
item.description: The article details violent clashes during the Ol Kalou by-election, which serves as a prelude to Kenya's 2027 presidential elections. Masked attackers targeted polling stations, journalists, and vote...
